task_completion.description: Blue Sky Plan 5 is open with a dental CBCT scan loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blue Sky Plan 5 application window is visible, and a 3D/2D dental CBCT scan (showing teeth and jawbone) is displayed in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: The view is focused on the lower right first molar region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cross-sectional, panoramic, or 3D view is zoomed in or centered on the posterior right side of the mandible (lower jaw), specifically around the first molar area.

task_completion.description: A distance measurement tool is actively used on the scan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line with a numerical distance value (in mm) is visible on one of the 2D slice views (typically the cross-sectional or tangential view).

task_completion.description: The measurement is taken from the crest of the alveolar ridge to the superior border of the mandibular canal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement line starts at the top edge of the jawbone (alveolar crest) and ends exactly at the upper boundary of the dark, circular/tubular structure within the bone (the mandibular canal).

task_completion.description: The project is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box is visible showing the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BlueSkyPlanTasks' and the filename 'measurement.bsp', or the application title bar updates to show 'measurement.bsp'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blue Sky Plan GUI to perform the measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with Blue Sky Plan's toolbars, menus, and viewing windows rather than terminal commands or scripts executing the task.

integrity.description: The measurement value appears to be genuinely generated by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement text matches the software's native UI font and style for annotations, and the value is clinically realistic (typically between 8 and 25 mm) rather than a pasted text overlay.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the software's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Windows/Blue Sky Plan save dialog is used to navigate to the target directory and save the file, rather than a script bypassing the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The clinically valid range for the ridge-to-canal distance in the lower right first molar region is between 8 mm and 25 mm. The measurement must span from the alveolar crest (top of the bone) to the superior border (top edge) of the mandibular canal (the dark tubular structure in the cross-sectional view). The expected output file path is C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BlueSkyPlanTasks\measurement.bsp.
